---
title: "<i>All Saints Magazine</i>"
---

## <i>All Saints Magazine</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This was the parish magazine of the church of All Saints, All Saints Road, Cheltenham.  The British Library holds the new series 1886-1909, which is catalogued as edited by the Rev. William Goldsborough Whittam who was curate there 1883-1888.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
